LoginStart Free

API Reference

Build custom integrations and automations with the IntegrateWise API.

REST API

The IntegrateWise REST API allows you to programmatically access and manipulate your workspace data, integrations, and AI agents.

Base URL
https://api.integratewise.com/v1
Authentication
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Quick Start

Example: Fetch workspace data

curl https://api.integratewise.com/v1/workspace \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"

{
  "id": "ws_123abc",
  "name": "My Workspace",
  "integrations": [...],
  "agents": [...]
}

API Endpoints

GET/workspaceGet workspace information
GET/integrationsList all integrations
POST/integrationsConnect a new integration
GET/agentsList AI agents
POST/agents/:id/invokeInvoke an AI agent
GET/spine/entitiesQuery the Spine data layer
POST/renderGenerate output from data

Official SDKs

Use our official client libraries for your preferred language.

JavaScript / TypeScript

npm i @integratewise/sdk

Python

pip install integratewise

Go

go get github.com/integratewise/go-sdk
